decision_rationale: no_per_pass_fps_evidence: the GRX contract requires per-pass FPS >= 0.95x baseline before any default enablement, and no full baseline or per-pass benchmark evidence exists (GRX-005 runner evidence is quick-smoke only)

patch_0010_writeback_is_scaffold: the level-0 result writeback keeps the native Godot luminance path running as continuation/backstop (it still re-renders every reduction level), so the opt-in Rurix dispatch yields no measured net benefit yet

math_parity_gpu_leg_partial: math parity for the GPU leg is level-0 CPU-proven pending multi-level observation (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); full pyramid/EMA/WRITE_LUMINANCE parity is not proven
does_not_imply: net-benefit Rurix dispatch (patch 0010 result writeback is a scaffold; the native Godot continuation re-renders all levels)
